case_title: WOLOVOY, JESSE VS STERNBERG, PAULANN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLOVOY, JESSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STERNBERG, PAULANN STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.
